siteSettings.title: English Adventures: Wish, If & If Only

modules.name: Learn
modules.title: Wish & If Only Lessons
modules.instructions: Master expressing regrets, desires, and hypotheticals using wish, if, and if only. Learn the differences between present and past unreal situations.

modules.name: Write
modules.title: Wish Writing Practice
modules.instructions: Write sentences expressing regrets about the present and past using wish, if, and if only structures.

modules.name: Play
modules.title: Wish Games
modules.instructions: Play games to practice forming wish sentences and understanding the difference between wish and if only.

modules.name: Quiz
modules.title: Wish Quiz
modules.instructions: Test your knowledge with questions about wish, if, and if only usage.

modules.name: Apply
modules.title: Wish Challenge
modules.instructions: Apply wish structures correctly in complex sentences and mixed tenses.
